sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ تُحَاكِي التَّفْكِيرَ الْبَشَرِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je moderna tehnologija koja oponaša ljudsko razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a modern technology that mimics human thinking.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي تَشْخِيصِ الْأَمْرَاضِ بِدِقَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj sistem pomaže ljekarima u dijagnosticiranju bolesti s visokom preciznošću.
sentences.translationEn: This system helps doctors diagnose diseases with high accuracy.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُهُ الشَّرِكَاتُ الْآنَ لِتَحْسِينِ خِدْمَاتِهَا لِلزَّبَائِنِ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Kompanije ga sada koriste kako bi poboljšale svoje usluge klijentima širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Companies use it now to improve their services for customers around the world.
